name: Sweet and Sour Tvp®
recipeIngredient: 20 oz. pineapple chunks, canned in juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the TVP® chunks, catsup, and hot water. Cover tightly and microwave on medium high power for 10 minutes or add ½ cup water and simmer in a covered pan until tender, but not mushy (20-30 minutes).
2. Bring 1 cup of water to a boil and add carrots and green pepper. Cover, return to boil and cook for 2 minutes to crisp-tender. Remove from heat, drain, and reserve liquid. Return the reserved liquid to the pan and add pineapple juice.
3. In a small bowl, combine sugar, vinegar, and cornstarch. Stir into the hot liquid; the sauce will thicken and come to a boil almost immediately.
4. Add the cooked TVP®, carrots, green peppers, and pineapple to the sauce. Serve over rice or crisp chow mein noodles. This dish can be made ahead of time and reheated later before serving over rice or noodles.
Per Serving: 234 calories. 6 grams protein. 56 grams carbohydrates. 0 grams fat
